Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial With Court Reporter Fee
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION, AND TOM HUI's Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
